score_dimensions.label: Risk Score
score_dimensions.description: Likelihood and severity of safety, schedule, or quality failures

score_dimensions.label: Efficiency Score
score_dimensions.description: Resource utilization and duration relative to optimal baseline

score_dimensions.label: Safety Score
score_dimensions.description: Compliance with safety plans, separation of trades, protection adequacy

score_dimensions.label: Coordination Burden
score_dimensions.description: Number and complexity of handoffs, RFIs, and inter-trade dependencies

score_dimensions.label: Inspection Readiness
score_dimensions.description: Probability that work will pass inspection without rework

score_dimensions.label: Rework Exposure
score_dimensions.description: Likelihood that completed work will need to be undone or redone

score_dimensions.label: Weather Sensitivity
score_dimensions.description: Degree to which the planned sequence is disrupted by weather events

overall.description: Single weighted composite score across all dimensions for entire project

by_zone.description: Composite score per zone, using only conditions relevant to that zone

by_condition.description: Score per active constraint condition, measuring how well it is managed

by_sequence.description: Score per install sequence step, identifying weakest links in the build order
